Definition: Dune is a specialized context-aware external keypad and tactile interface designed exclusively for the macOS ecosystem. Categorized as an adaptive input peripheral, it features three physical keys housed in a premium CNC-machined enclosure, functioning as a real-time hardware shortcut controller that dynamically reconfigures its input commands based on the active foreground application.
